name: baseline-recipe-selection
description: Bundled baseline recipe tools for historical recipe selection and prepreg B-side liquid-solid ratio guidance.

tools.name: baseline_recipe_selection
tools.description: Select ranked baseline recipes from local historical recipe export JSON. Use for baseline recipe selection, explainable historical ranking, material-plus-test similarity ranking, and returning detailed normalized experiment records instead of only baseline IDs.

action.description: Operation to run. Defaults to schema when omitted.

material_groups.description: Preferred resin and hardener material pools.

test_constraints.description: Record of test constraints keyed by test name. Values support a single constraint object or a temperature-indexed map of constraint objects.

expert_opinion.description: Optional expert text used to infer allowed hardener system families.

ranking_priority.description: Optional ranking order for test constraints.

top_k.description: Maximum number of ranked baseline recipes to return. Defaults to 5.

export_path.description: Optional local path to a merged recipe export JSON or a directory containing resin/hardener/mixture/mechanics raw export JSON files.

tools.name: prepreg_b_ratio_guard
tools.description: Analyze prepreg B-side formulations using historical usage statistics plus a hard liquid:solid ratio gate. Use for prepreg B剂 solid dosing, liquid-vs-powder balancing, and checking whether a planned B-side recipe is likely too dry to mix.

action.description: Operation to run. Defaults to schema when omitted.

components.description: Planned B-side materials. Each item should provide either amount or proportion.

b_total_amount.description: Total B-side amount on the current basis. Required when components use proportion; optional when components use amount.

mix_ratio_hardener.description: Alias of b_total_amount, for example the B value in a 100:15 mix ratio.

ratio_limits.description: Override the hard liquid:solid screening window. Defaults to 1.5-2.5.

history_path.description: Optional local recipe history source. Supports recipe cache .pkl files or baseline export JSON/directory.

master_map_path.description: Explicit path to material_label_map_w_chemicalname_分類_性質數據.xlsx.

history_lower_percentile.description: Lower percentile used for the historical solid/liquid recommendation window.

history_upper_percentile.description: Upper percentile used for the historical solid/liquid recommendation window.

example_limit.description: Number of closest historical examples to return.
